design_philosophy: Dead simple, calm, planner-like, non-gamified. Focused on clarity, reduced cognitive load, and utility for a solo SSC CGL aspirant.

typography.pairing_rationale: Chivo provides a sturdy, structural, almost editorial weight for headers (reflecting the discipline of study), while Karla is a highly legible, slightly quirky grotesque that warms up the interface, removing the coldness of typical tech fonts.

layout.container: w-full max-w-[680px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#F9F8F6] pb-20 md:pb-0 relative shadow-sm

navigation.mobile: Fixed bottom tab bar. h-16, bg-[#FFFFFF], border-t border-[#E4E2DE]. 4 equal tabs. Icon + tiny text.
navigation.desktop: Sticky top nav (visible md:flex hidden). h-16 bg-[#F9F8F6]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E4E2DE]. Flex row, aligned links.

cards.base: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-[12px] border border-[#E4E2DE] shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] p-5 transition-shadow hover:shadow-md

buttons.primary: bg-[#3D3A8C] text-white rounded-[8px] h-[48px] px-6 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center transition-colors hover:bg-[#2B286B]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FFFFFF] text-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#E4E2DE] rounded-[8px] h-[48px] px-6 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center transition-colors hover:bg-[#F9F8F6]
buttons.mark_done: bg-[#1E6E4A] text-white rounded-[8px] h-[48px] px-6 font-bold transition-transform active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center

inputs.text: w-full h-[48px] bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E4E2DE] rounded-[8px] px-4 text-[#1A1A1A] placeholder:text-[#6B6B6B]/60 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#3D3A8C]/20 focus:border-[#3D3A8C]
inputs.textarea: w-full min-h-[120px] bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E4E2DE] rounded-[8px] p-4 text-[#1A1A1A] resize-y placeholder:text-[#6B6B6B]/60 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#3D3A8C]/20 focus:border-[#3D3A8C]

pills.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-5 h-[44px] rounded-full text-sm font-semibold border transition-all cursor-pointer shrink-0

badges.small: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-[6px] text-xs font-bold bg-[#F9F8F6] text-[#6B6B6B] border border-[#E4E2DE]

toast.style: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white rounded-[8px] shadow-lg p-4 flex items-center gap-3 font-medium text-sm

Today.description: Daily dashboard prioritizing immediate action over analytics.
sections: Empty State: Gentle typography/icon ('All caught up. Breathe.')
Due Today: Grouped by subject. Each item is a card with Chapter Name, Subject Badge, Difficulty, and a prominent 'Mark Done' button.
Completed Today: Collapsible accordion. Faded opacity for completed items.

Add_Chapter.description: Frictionless entry for new study material.
Add_Chapter.layout: Single column form with generous spacing.
elements: Subject Selector: Horizontal scrollable row of Pills.
Date Completed: Shadcn DatePicker (customized), max date = today.
Success State: In-line or modal confirmation showing exactly what days the 4 revisions (Day 1, 3, 7, 30) will fall on to build trust in the system.

All_Chapters.description: The ledger of all study material.
elements: Top Bar: Search input + Subject/Status filter pills.
Chapter Card: Shows title, subject, notes snippet.
Progress Bar: Minimalist segmented line (e.g., 2/4 done).
Timeline (Expandable): A vertical or horizontal stepper showing the 4 revision dates, their status (Pending/Done/Missed), and the actual dates.
Actions: Edit notes, Delete chapter (hidden in a dropdown/ellipsis).

Calendar.description: Visual month-view of the revision workload.
Calendar.layout: Standard 7-column calendar grid. Desktop can place details side-by-side.
elements: Grid Cells: Clear typography. Dates with revisions show tiny colored dots corresponding to the Subject colors.
Interactivity: Tapping a day opens a Bottom Sheet (Mobile) or Side Panel (Desktop) listing the specific chapters due on that date.
Controls: Prev/Next month icons, 'Today' reset button.
Legend: Minimalist legend showing subject dot colors.

iconography.style: Stroke width 1.5 for a sophisticated, planner-like thinness.

testing.guidelines: ALL interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` in kebab-case representing role/action. Examples: `data-testid='tab-today'`, `data-testid='add-chapter-submit'`, `data-testid='mark-done-button-math'`.

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React JS (.js/.jsx files only, NO TypeScript). Tailwind CSS. Shadcn UI (customized).
instructions_to_main_agent.state_management: localStorage ONLY. Use custom hooks (e.g., useChapters) to manage state and sync to localStorage.
strict_rules: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Create mobile bottom tab bar and desktop top nav based on screen width.
